name: @fs-ds/react
description: FS Design System — React wrappers for fs-ds web components

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external @fs-ds/web-components --external @fs-ds/tokens --external lit
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external @fs-ds/web-components --external @fs-ds/tokens --external lit --watch
